name: Poem — Film Collage Word Basket
description: A full-screen poetic collage H5 with a cinematic background video, two to three tonal image layers, a draggable basket of paper word chips, scene switching, and a live-image save flow. It is designed for gifts where the recipient should play with words and assemble a personal sentence on top of a beautiful film-textured landscape or realistic atmosphere.

slots.purpose: Raw material used to infer the poem theme, recipient language, real-life anchors, visual mood, and word bank: photos, screenshots, notes, a one-line brief, movie/book/social-post references, or a folder of mixed source material.
grounding_rules: If the user does not provide a clear theme, infer one from the strongest concrete motifs in the raw material before searching or generating media.
Theme titles should connect to real life but remain broad enough for many sentences to be assembled under them.
Do not invent private facts about the recipient; keep specific visible references traceable to the user's material.

slots.purpose: Editorial plan for the collage poem: the theme, emotional field, real-life anchors, visual direction, word-bank strategy, and paper palette.

output_fields.theme_title: short CJK or recipient-language title, e.g. 山海替你保存一封信
output_fields.theme_subtitle: small atmospheric English/Chinese subtitle or fragments
output_fields.real_life_anchors: places, objects, routines, names, era details, foods, tickets, weather, or phrases grounded in material
output_fields.visual_mood: film texture, landscape/realistic atmosphere, palette, light, grain, and abstraction level
output_fields.background_video_prompt: prompt/query for a beautiful HD film-textured video, preferably landscape or realistic with slight abstraction
output_fields.image_search_or_generation_plan: how to find/generate 2-3 still images that match the video's palette and theme
output_fields.word_bank_strategy: semantic clusters, everyday weird words, function-word density, and repeated connectors
output_fields.paper_palette: paper chip colors and textures that harmonize with the selected video/images

rules: Start from user material. Only use generic poetic themes when there is no usable material and the user explicitly wants free creation.
Prefer themes with real-world handles: shore, bus stop, receipt, moonlight, kitchen table, summer grass, night train, wet street, old envelope.
Avoid overly narrow themes that can only support one sentence; the basket should support many possible poems.

slots.purpose: The full-screen moving background. It should be found from user-provided media, searched as suitable stock/reference media, or generated from the inferred theme.
selection_rules: If user-provided visual material exists, extract the theme and palette from it first.
If no video is provided, search for or generate a beautiful, cinematic, HD, film-grain background video that feels realistic or landscape-forward; slight abstraction is allowed.
Keep motion gentle enough that word chips remain readable.
Prefer coherent palettes: warm moon/sepia, grass/sun, rain/blue-gray, harbor/amber, or another palette grounded in the theme.
Create or select a poster image for loading/export fallback.

slots.purpose: Two to three still images layered over the video. They should share theme, palette, grain, and emotional era with the background video.
style_rules: Keep images tonal with the background video; avoid mixing unrelated aesthetics.
Use landscape, realistic, archival, film-still, paper-document, object, or slightly abstract images that can sit in collage space.
Do not let images fight the word chips; leave breathing room around expected starter words.
Use opacity/filter/layout to make the set feel like one visual world.

slots.purpose: A rich basket of draggable words and short phrases for collage poetry.
rules: Use many words, not a sparse keyword list; collage poetry is hard when the basket is thin.
Mix theme nouns, concrete life objects, verbs, adjectives, emotional words, place names, names/nicknames when grounded, everyday internet/life phrases, and a few absurd or funny realistic words.
Include plenty of function words and connectors: 的、地、得、在、把、给、从、向、和、与、或、而、但是、因为、所以、如果、然后、后来、之前、之后、里面、旁边.
Repeat especially useful particles/connectors such as 的、地、得、在、把、给, instead of forcing every token to appear only once.
Keep most chips short enough to fit, but include a few longer vivid phrases for surprise.

slots.purpose: Initial word chips already placed on the canvas, giving the recipient a playable first poem rather than an empty surface.
rules: Starter words should form a loose line with gaps, not a finished slogan.
They should include at least one connector or particle so the recipient can continue the sentence naturally.
Keep positions inside the 1080x1350 stage coordinate system.

slots.purpose: Paper chip textures and ink colors. Pick a paper palette that harmonizes with the selected video and still images.
selection_rules: Warm sepia/moon scenes can use cream, kraft, old letter, black, and muted blue paper.
Grass/summer scenes can use off-white, cream, kraft, soft blue, and grid papers.
Do not create a rainbow basket unless the theme itself calls for playful chaos.
Ink colors should stay readable on the chosen paper and should echo the background palette.

slots.purpose: Advanced direct overrides for scenes, filmLayerSets, wordSets, starterSets, paperPaths, starterPapers, paperColors, fontOptions, blackPaper, initialSceneId, and initialSceneIndex.
slots.bounds_rule: Film layer coordinates and starter word coordinates use the 1080x1350 stage coordinate system. Keep key text inside the visible central collage area on mobile and desktop.

build_contract.input: filled-slots.json containing poem_theme_plan, poem_scenes/background media, film layers, word bank, starter words, paper palette, and optional runtime overrides
build_contract.output: single index.html in the gift folder
build_contract.source_policy: template-source/collage-poem.html is canonical and read-only; build.py writes a separate output file.
build_contract.inline_strategy: base64 local image/video/font paths from filled-slots.json, the workdir, the fetched base bundle, or template-source into the output HTML

activation_disclosure.message: 这个模板会下载约 50MB 的视频、纸张、字体和拼贴图片素材。真正重要的是先从你的素材里提炼主题，再为这个主题找或生成同色调的电影感背景视频、2-3 张图片和足够丰富的词语篮子。
activation_disclosure.show_before: fetching asset bundle or generating/searching replacement video and images
cost_notes: Asset bundle download is about 50MB on first use.
Custom background videos may require video generation or external media search.
Custom still image layers may use image generation or careful source-image selection.
The final word bank should use the user's habitual language with the recipient and include many connectors/particles.

options.label: built-in collage poem
options.description: Download the bundle, use the included grass/letter scenes and paper library, customize title, words, and starter chips.

options.label: custom theme media
options.description: Infer or accept a theme, then find or generate a matching film-textured background video, 2-3 tonal images, a large word bank, and matching paper palette.

options.label: text/image fallback
options.description: Skip the heavier H5/video path and make a static collage poem or written poem from the same theme.
